assertions.title: Per-user refresh triggered after sync completion

steps.action: Run targeted vitest for per-user scope and event-type tests
steps.expected: Simulate integration/sync.connection completion and assert dashboard/baselines.refresh.user emitted with data.userId = X; assert writes scoped to X
steps.observed: Passed tests confirm per-user scoping (refreshBaselinesForUser processes only the specified userId) and event type definition, but no executed test in this targeted suite simulates sync completion and asserts actual event emission payload.

assertions.issues: Targeted vitest coverage located and executed does not include a sync-completion emission assertion for dashboard/baselines.refresh.user with explicit data.userId payload.

assertions.title: Per-user baseline refresh triggered after sync

steps.action: Run targeted vitest for sync-trigger-related job tests
steps.expected: Test verifies event emission after successful sync completion
steps.observed: Executed targeted tests verify per-user refresh function scoping and event type presence, but no executed assertion verifies post-sync emission timing/payload.

assertions.issues: No targeted vitest assertion found/executed that directly validates dashboard/baselines.refresh.user emission after sync completion.

blockers.description: Assertion contracts for VAL-JOBS-005 and VAL-JOBS-007 require explicit sync-completion event emission verification, but the located targeted tests cover per-user scoping and event type definition rather than emission assertion.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Searched assertion IDs and event names across src/ tests and executed the closest targeted suite (baselines-refresh.test.ts with name-pattern filtering).

summary: Tested 3 assertions with targeted vitest: 1 passed (VAL-JOBS-004), 2 blocked (VAL-JOBS-005, VAL-JOBS-007) due missing direct sync-completion event-emission assertion coverage in executed tests.
